name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic Baguette Medium Handbag, Trousseau fabric, FF jacquard pattern in dove grey. Accented with tonal leather details and FF buckle. Features a front flap, magnetic closure, internal compartment with suede lining and zip pocket, vintage gold hardware. The bag comes with a removable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Model: F6221, Dimensions: 27*6*15cm
